title: Ace Hotbar & XP Bar
description: Hotbar changed into the colors of the Ace pride flag!
body:
This Resource Pack edits the Hotbar and XP Bar to have the Ace Flag color palette!

This edit changes the textures of the following things:

-Hotbar -Hotbar Selection Slot -Offhand Slot -XP Bar

It's also possible to use this on older versions! I've added the needed files into the folder!
